intro.label: Introduction
intro.heading: Innovative strategies for sustainable and high-performance growth.
intro.p1: Marabu Services supports businesses, institutions and organisations in their strategic, operational and relational challenges. Our approach combines African wisdom with modern strategic action, delivering tailor-made, lasting, high-impact solutions.
intro.p2: Specialised in strategic consulting, operational services and institutional intermediation, we operate where decisions are made — with governments, technical and financial partners, and the private actors shaping the continent.
intro.p3: Founded in 2023 and based in Abidjan, Marabu is the partner of those who want to build with method, influence with integrity and grow with vision.

items.name: Consulting
items.tagline: We help you make the right decisions.
items.description: Strategy, transformation, governance — alongside leaders who want to move forward with method and rigor.

cases.project: Marabu, architect of the inauguration of Yango Côte d'Ivoire's national headquarters
cases.description: Global design, organisation and coordination of the inauguration of Yango's national headquarters in Abidjan — scenography, logistics, event communication and protocol coordination.
Delivery of a strategic training session on e-reputation and crisis communication for managers at Côte d'Ivoire's Single Window for Foreign Trade, across 5 expert-led modules.

cases.project: Strategic tour with Technical and Financial Partners
cases.description: Support for GUCE CI in a strategic tour with international Technical and Financial Partners, including the Turkish Embassy, to promote the digitisation of foreign trade in Côte d'Ivoire.

items.quote: Marabu helped us structure our growth strategy in West Africa with a clarity and method we had never had before.

who.label: Who we are
who.heading: A centuries-old heritage reinvented into modern strategic action.
who.p1: For centuries, African marabouts guided communities with wisdom and foresight. Advisors, mediators and guardians of knowledge, they embodied an enlightened authority capable of turning challenges into opportunities.
who.p2: Founded in 2023, Marabu reinvents this heritage. A strategic actor in consulting, services and intermediation, we combine tradition and technology to support our partners in an ever-changing world.

founder.label: Founder's note
founder.heading: Why Marabu?
founder.quote1: "I grew up with the idea that the marabouts of our villages were the first strategists — those entrusted with difficult decisions, delicate mediations, future projects. They acted with discernment, network and trust."
founder.quote2: "Marabu is the contemporary translation of this posture. We bring to businesses and institutions what these wise men brought to communities: clarity, connections and direction."

name.label: The name's meaning
name.heading: A sage. A guide. A bridge between two worlds.
name.p1: In African traditions, the marabout is far more than an advisor. He is the guardian of knowledge, the mediator of conflicts, the guide of communities facing decisions that shape the future. His authority does not come from his title — it comes from the trust he has earned.
name.p2: We are the heirs of this posture. Marabu translates this ancestral wisdom into contemporary strategic action: accompanying, guiding, connecting — with the same demand for integrity and clarity.

mvp.label: Mission
mvp.text: To embody excellence and innovation through concrete and strategic solutions. To support businesses and institutions in their ambitions for growth, digitalisation and sustainable performance.

mvp.label: Vision
mvp.text: To build bridges between local needs and global opportunities. To be the transformation catalyst that places people, innovation and long-term vision at the heart of every mission.

mvp.label: Our promise
mvp.text: Tailor-made, high-value answers. With agility, boldness and impact — we shape success trajectories together.

items.title: Inspired Innovation
items.desc: Uniting traditions with modern technologies. We draw on African wisdom to design solutions rooted in the present and oriented towards the future.

items.title: Positive Impact
items.desc: Contributing to sustainable and inclusive development. Each mission is assessed on its real value to the organisations and communities they serve.

items.title: Client Commitment
items.desc: Providing personalised solutions to your needs. We do not sell generic formulas — we build tailor-made answers, with you.

impact.label: Social Impact
impact.desc: Every mandate we accept is a responsibility. We measure our success by the real impact generated for our clients and the communities they serve.

servicesPage.subtitle: Strategic consulting, operational services, intermediation — Marabu steps in where rigour, connections and vision make the difference.

services.name: Consulting
services.intro: We support leaders and institutions in their most complex strategic decisions. Our approach combines analytical rigour with knowledge of the African terrain.

offerings.title: Business strategy
offerings.desc: Setting direction, competitive positioning, medium and long-term development plans. We help organisations clarify their vision and build realistic trajectories.

offerings.title: Organisational transformation
offerings.desc: Change management, optimisation of structures and processes. Marabu accompanies deep transformations with method and care for teams.

offerings.title: Governance & compliance
offerings.desc: Design of governance frameworks adapted to regulatory requirements and institutional challenges of the sub-region.

offerings.title: Change management
offerings.desc: Human and cultural change leadership. Training of executive teams, managing resistance, lasting accompaniment through transformation.

services.name: Services
services.intro: Operational frameworks to strengthen your teams, amplify your image and deliver tangible results. Marabu works with you, not in your place.

offerings.title: Professional training
offerings.desc: Tailored modules: e-reputation, crisis communication, leadership, project management. Delivered by experts, in person or online.

offerings.title: Institutional communication
offerings.desc: Editorial strategy, brand image management, press relations. We build coherent and lasting narratives for your institutions.

offerings.title: Strategic events
offerings.desc: Design, organisation and coordination of high-impact events: inaugurations, summits, institutional ceremonies, forums.

offerings.title: Content creation
offerings.desc: Production of high added-value content: reports, advocacy pieces, institutional publications, training materials.

services.name: Intermediation
services.intro: Marabu acts behind the scenes with discretion and method. We open the doors that matter — in governmental, diplomatic and financial circles.

offerings.title: Government relations
offerings.desc: Strategic interface with public decision-makers, ministries and regulatory institutions. Facilitation of high-sensitivity dialogues.

offerings.title: Private diplomacy
offerings.desc: Support in bilateral negotiations, influence missions and mandates with an international dimension.

offerings.title: PTF partnerships
offerings.desc: Networking and facilitation with Technical and Financial Partners: donors, development agencies, embassies.

offerings.title: Influence strategy
offerings.desc: Building influence positioning, interest advocacy, mapping of key actors and management of power relations.

methode.title: How we work
methode.desc: Every mandate is unique. Our process adapts to your constraints, but always rests on the same foundations: listening, rigour, impact.

steps.title: Listening & diagnosis
steps.desc: Before any recommendation, we take the time to understand your real challenges. An in-depth consultation to grasp the context, constraints and ambitions.

steps.title: Designing the framework
steps.desc: We design a tailor-made response — no generic formulas. Each mission is built around your specific objectives.

steps.title: Implementation & steering
steps.desc: Rigorous execution with regular follow-up. We remain present throughout the mission to adjust in real time.

steps.title: Assessment & impact
steps.desc: Impact measurement, clear reporting of results and recommendations for the next steps. We measure our success by yours.

contact.desc: Whether you are in the reflection phase or ready to launch a mission, we are available for a first no-commitment conversation.
